message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 任务下发流程

actor nsq as "nsq"
participant "GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener" as listener
participant "guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor" as processor
participant "GuideTaskAssignDomainService" as domainService
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as readApi
participant "GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy" as strategy
participant "GuideTaskAssignFactory" as factory
participant "GuideTaskAssignRepository" as assignRepo
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as taskRepo
participant "NsqProducer" as producer

== 任务下发流程 ==

activate listener
activate processor
activate domainService
activate readApi
activate strategy
activate factory
activate assignRepo
activate taskRepo
activate producer

' Step 1: nsq sends task
nsq -> listener : 1 下发任务

' Step 2: Listener starts processing
listener -> processor : 2 开始处理

' Step 3: Processor assigns task to domain service
processor -> domainService : 3 任务分配

' Step 4: Domain service queries department
domainService -> readApi : 4 查询下发对象 department
note left of readApi : 下发给所有部门

' Step 5: Domain service assigns task
readApi --> domainService
domainService -> strategy : 5 分配任务

' Step 6: Strategy creates task entity
strategy -> factory : 6 创建分配的任务实体
note left of factory : 只有任务下发给导购的时候\n才创建导购的任务明细

' Transaction block for saving states
rectangle "Transaction" {
    ' Step 7: Save status flow to completed
    factory --> domainService
    domainService -> assignRepo : 7 保存分配状态 status flow 任务流转至 分配完成
    
    ' Step 8: Save status flow to pending
    assignRepo --> domainService
    domainService -> taskRepo : 8 保存分配状态 status flow 任务流转至 待启动
}

' Step 9: Send completion message
taskRepo --> domainService
domainService -> producer : 9 发送下发完成消息，准备启动任务

deactivate producer
deactivate taskRepo
deactivate assignRepo
deactivate factory
deactivate strategy
deactivate readApi
deactivate domainService
deactivate processor
deactivate listener

@enduml
```
